About Us

Quintessence was born in Kaduna with one clear mission: to make premium, long-lasting fragrances accessible to every Nigerian. We believe you shouldn't have to choose between smelling incredible and staying within budget.

Over three years and 500+ happy customers later, we've grown from a small passion project into a trusted fragrance destination. Our catalogue spans richly concentrated Perfume Oils that last 8–12 hours, refreshing Body Mists, bold Body Sprays, soothing Incense, gentle Baby Colognes, and our signature Bloom Butter — a hair growth butter that nourishes from root to tip.

Every product we carry is carefully sourced, authentically tested, and chosen because it performs. Not because it looks good on a shelf. We ship across Nigeria, and every order — big or small — is handled with care and pride.

Quintessence isn't just a fragrance brand. It's a statement. You deserve to be unforgettable.

500+Happy Customers
20+Scent Varieties
3+Years of Trust

What Our Customers Say

"The scent lasts all day and I always get compliments. Quintessence is now my go-to."

— Dezmond, Kaduna

"Affordable but smells very expensive. I love the oil perfumes so much."

— Vivienne, Lagos

"Fast delivery and beautiful packaging. I will definitely order again."

— KennySavaGe, Jos

✓ Thank you! Your review has been submitted.

Why Quintessence?

Because fragrance is not just a scent. It's confidence. Presence. Memory. Every Quintessence product is chosen to make you feel unforgettable.

😭

Long-Lasting Scents

Our oils last 8–12 hours. Our sprays carry through meetings, outings, and nights out — no reapplication needed.

💎

Affordable Luxury

Fragrances that smell like ₦50k but won't cost you anywhere near it. Quality you can actually afford every day.

⭐

Trusted & Reliable

100+ happy customers across Nigeria. From Kaduna to Lagos to Jos — our scents travel everywhere you do.

Common Questions

Our Perfume Oils are highly concentrated — a single drop applied to pulse points typically lasts 8–12 hours. Body sprays and mists last 4–6 hours. For max longevity, apply right after a shower on moisturised skin.
Yes! We deliver across Nigeria. Kaduna orders are typically same-day or next-day. Nationwide delivery takes 2–4 business days depending on your location. Delivery fees vary by state.
Once you click "Enquire Now" or "Order via WhatsApp," we'll send you our bank details or accept payment via transfer. Your order is confirmed once payment is received.
We accept returns within 7 days if the product is unused and in original packaging. Reach out via WhatsApp to initiate a return.
Absolutely! We do gift packaging for orders. Just let us know when you place your order via WhatsApp and we'll make it special. Great for birthdays, celebrations, and appreciation gifts.
Yes — every product we carry is genuine. We source all our fragrances directly from trusted suppliers and manufacturers. What you see is exactly what you get.

Stay in the Loop

Be the first to know about new arrivals, restocks, and exclusive deals. No spam — just the good stuff.

💌 Send Email Campaign

Send a message to all your subscribers at once. They will receive it by email.

🆕 New Arrivals 💰 Promo Deal 🙏 Thank You 🔔 Restock Alert

How to use: Copy the message → open WhatsApp → go to a Broadcast List → select your contacts → paste and send. For email campaigns, use the Export CSV button and upload to Mailchimp or Brevo.
